title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Medical Officer at Dr. Reddy's Laboratories
jsonLd.description:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Bhubaneswar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Dr. Reddy's Laboratories:
Dr. Reddy's Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr. Reddy's Laboratories!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
